summary: Iteration 57 — Referral Reward Policy Update. Verified end-to-end that referrer credits (+25) are NO LONGER awarded on email verification and are ONLY awarded on the referred user's first successful wallet deposit. All 18 backend tests PASS (100% success). Coverage includes: signup with valid/invalid ref (student + professional both create pending referral rows), email-verify does NOT credit referrer but sends 'New referral signed up' notification, first ₹199 deposit atomically flips referral pending→rewarded and credits referrer +25 with referral_awarded=true in the response, second deposit is idempotent (no double-reward, referral_awarded=false), /refer/me exposes new keys {pending,qualified,rewarded,rejected,credits_earned} plus legacy `successful` alias mirroring `rewarded`, /refer/list rows include wallet_deposit_status, /refer/mine-inbound returns has_referral + referral_qualification_status. Adjacent flows unaffected: student welcome_bonus=100 still fires on verify, first ₹199 deposit still grants 398 credits, admin /admin/transactions/search finds the new referral_reward txn with delta=+25.
critical_code_review_comments: wallet.py L142-197: Referral qualification is guarded by `is_first_deposit` (snapshot of total_deposits before increment) AND status='pending' atomic update in db.referrals — correctly prevents double-award via race. Good.
auth.py L191-212: On email-verify, referrer only notified; self-referral is defensively marked rejected. `was_unverified` gate prevents re-notifying on repeated verify-otp calls.
referrals.py L73, L110, L144: Legacy status='successful' is consistently bucketed to 'rewarded' across /refer/me, /refer/list, /refer/mine-inbound — backward compat preserved.
auth.py L85-86: Self-referral guard silently drops referrer_user; consider adding a log line for observability (nice-to-have, not a bug).
wallet.py L128-129: `fresh_u` is re-fetched to snapshot total_deposits — correct pattern to avoid stale `u` from the JWT-hydrated dependency.
seed_data_creation: Fresh referrer + referred users (student and professional @acmecorp.io) created per test via /api/auth/signup; MOCK_PAYMENTS_MODE + TEST_RETURN_OTP=1 enable end-to-end deposit flow without external Razorpay/SendGrid.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 57 referral policy is stable. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_iter57_referral_policy.py can serve as regression coverage. Uses EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL env var (falls back to EXPO_BACKEND_URL). No mocked APIs — all flows exercised against live backend with MOCK_PAYMENTS_MODE=on.
rca_of_issue: N/A — feature verification (not a bug fix). Policy shift correctly implemented across auth.py (verify-otp: notify-only), wallet.py (confirm_deposit: atomic pending→rewarded + _credit_user), referrals.py (status buckets + legacy 'successful' alias).
